summary: Comprehensive testing of Enhanced Customers Page feature. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features: enriched data table with Sales Rep, Packages, Notes columns; Customer Details Modal with Overview/Payments/Notes tabs; Edit customer functionality; Add notes functionality; Activity log.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration warning in table rendering. This is a minor issue that doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All customer APIs are working correctly with proper authentication
Customer enrichment (sales_rep_name, notes_count, total_paid, total_packages) is working
Notes and Activities APIs are properly creating and retrieving data
Edit customer functionality updates data correctly
Minor React hydration warning in InspectionsPage table - not blocking
seed_data_creation: Test notes created during testing with TEST_NOTE_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Customers Page fully tested. Features verified: 1) Customers list with enriched columns (Sales Rep, Packages, Notes count), 2) Customer Details Modal with 3 tabs (Overview, Payments, Notes), 3) Edit customer inline in modal, 4) Add notes functionality, 5) Activity log. All backend APIs working: GET /api/customers (enriched), GET /api/customers/{id}/detailed-payments, POST/GET /api/customers/{id}/notes, GET /api/customers/{id}/activities, PUT /api/customers/{id}.

backend_apis.GET /api/customers: PASS - Returns enriched data with sales_rep_name, notes_count, total_paid, total_packages
backend_apis.GET /api/customers with filters: PASS - Search, city, payment_status filters working
backend_apis.POST /api/customers/{id}/notes: PASS - Creates note and logs activity
backend_apis.GET /api/customers/{id}/notes: PASS - Returns customer notes sorted by date

frontend_ui.Summary_cards: PASS - Total Customers, Payments Completed, Payments Pending, Total Revenue cards visible
frontend_ui.Enhanced_table_columns: PASS - Customer, City, Payment, Packages, Sales Rep, Notes, Actions columns visible
frontend_ui.Customer_rows: PASS - 10 customer rows displayed with data
frontend_ui.Customer_Details_Modal: PASS - Modal opens with customer info header
frontend_ui.Overview_tab: PASS - Shows customer info (Name, Mobile, City, Email, Address) and Summary
frontend_ui.Edit_functionality: PASS - Edit button enables inline editing with Save/Cancel
frontend_ui.Payments_tab: PASS - Shows package-wise payment breakdown or 'No packages' message
frontend_ui.Notes_tab: PASS - Shows notes list with user and timestamp, Add note input
frontend_ui.Activity_Log: PASS - Activity Log sub-tab visible with activities
